name: Coconut-Pecan Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-1/2 quart slow cooker, combine shredded sweet potatoes, brown sugar, melted margarine or butter, coconut flakes, toasted pecans, and ground cinnamon.
2. Cover; cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours or on HIGH for 3 to 4 hours.
3. Stir in coconut flavoring and vanilla extract.
4. Sprinkle with additional toasted coconut if desired.
